executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Use the following test credentials for authentication:
- Admin login: email="admin@test.com", password="TestAdmin123!"
- Teacher login: email="teacher@test.com", password="TestTeacher123!"
- Student login: email="student@test.com", password="TestStudent123!"
- Parent login: email="parent@test.com", password="TestParent123!"

The login pages are at:
- Admin: /login/admin
- Teacher: /login/teacher  
- Student: /login/student
- General: /login

Use data-testid attributes to find elements:
- data-testid="login-role-student" for student login card
- data-testid="login-role-teacher" for teacher login card
- data-testid="login-role-admin" for admin login card
- data-testid="login-email-input" for email field
- data-testid="login-password-input" for password field
- data-testid="login-submit-button" for submit button
- data-testid="language-toggle-button" for language toggle

For VR experience, the main page at /vr-eduverse now links directly to /vr-eduverse/science/solar-system which has a 3D Solar System experience.
